landing.heroSubtitle: Create your CV, cover letter and recommendation letters, ATS-ready, with smart AI-powered filling.
landing.howItWorksIntro: AI workflow in 3 steps: copy the template, have ChatGPT or Claude fill it with your profile, then import the result into the editor.
landing.step1Text: Use the button below to copy the empty JSON structure (CV, cover letter and recommendation letter) to your clipboard.
landing.step2Title: 2. Give it to ChatGPT or Claude with your profile
landing.step2Text: Paste the JSON into ChatGPT or Claude, describe your profile (education, experience, skills, goals), and ask it to fill the JSON with your data. You can also ask for a targeted cover letter or recommendation letter.
landing.promptExample: "Fill this JSON with my profile: [your CV or description]. Keep the same JSON structure."
landing.step3Title: 3. Import the result into the editor
landing.step3Text: In the editor, click "Magic Fill (Import JSON)", paste the AI-generated JSON and confirm. Your CV, cover letter and recommendation letter will be pre-filled; you can then adjust and download the PDF.
landing.footer: CV-Builder — CV, cover letter and recommendation letters, ATS-ready.
landing.authCtaTitle: Save your documents in the Cloud
landing.authCtaDescription: Create a free account to save all your resumes and documents in the Cloud. (A confirmation email will be sent upon registration).

jsonZone.label: Paste your Internships Assistant JSON here

boxes.profileJsonPlaceholder:
Paste here a JSON with your basic info:
{"firstName":"...","lastName":"...","email":"...",...}
boxes.profileImportSuccess: Profile imported successfully. Check the fields then save.
boxes.cvIntro: These fields are specific to each application. Use the « Magic Auto-Fill » button above to fill them from a JSON, or edit them manually.
boxes.coverLetterIntro: Sender details (name, email, phone) are taken automatically from your Permanent Profile.
boxes.recommendationIntro: Recommendation letter (e.g. from a professor or former employer). The candidate name can be filled from the profile.
boxes.welcomeText: Please set up your basic profile below (name, email, education…). This data will be saved in your browser and reused for all your applications.

auth.resetEmailSent: An email with a reset link has been sent to you.
auth.signupConfirmMessage: Please confirm your account via the link sent to your email address.
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Account not confirmed. Check your inbox and click the confirmation link.

form.noEducation: No degree added. Click "+ Add" above.
form.resumePlaceholder: Your professional summary for this application...
form.noExperience: No experience. Click "+ Add" or use Auto-Fill.
form.noProject: No project. Click "+ Add" or use Auto-Fill.
form.noSkill: No skill. Click "+ Add" or use Auto-Fill.
form.fileNameCvHint: This name will be used when downloading the CV PDF.
form.subject: Subject
form.bodyPlaceholder: Write your letter here or use Auto-Fill...
form.fileNameLetterHint: This name will be used when downloading the cover letter PDF.
form.targetCompanyPlaceholder: Company for which the letter is intended

account.title: My Account
account.subtitle: Manage your account and data.
account.deleteAccountDescription: Deleting your account removes your data saved in the cloud (profile, CVs, letters).
account.noDocuments: No documents saved in the cloud.

onboarding.step1Content: Paste here the JSON generated by your AI Assistant, then click Magic Auto-Fill.
onboarding.step2Content: Edit text manually here or reorder sections by drag and drop.
onboarding.step3Content: Change the CV design with one click (FlowCV or Classic).
onboarding.step4Content: Download your optimized CV or letter as PDF.

jsonImportModal.title: Magic Fill (Import JSON)
jsonImportModal.description: Paste here the JSON generated by ChatGPT or Claude (CV, cover letter, recommendation letter or profile). Click Apply to fill the editor.

helpModal.title: How to create your CV in 3 minutes with AI ⚡
helpModal.step1Text: Get the empty CV structure from our app.
helpModal.step2Text: Go to your favorite AI, paste the template, and add your LinkedIn profile or the job posting. Ask it to fill in the fields!
helpModal.promptExample: Act as an HR expert. Fill this JSON with my info (LinkedIn profile or job posting below) for an ATS-optimized CV and cover letter.
helpModal.step3Text: Copy the result from the AI and import it here. Your CV is ready and formatted!
